# polytomic_linkedin_company_pages_connection (Data Source)

LinkedIn Company Pages Connection

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "polytomic_linkedin_company_pages_connection" "linkedin_company_pages" {
  id = "aab123aa-27f3-abc1-9999-abcde123a4aa"
}
```
